understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the character to the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the whole game is won, using no more than 2 attempts per level and up to 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (optionally UNDO to revert the previous action). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), reach the goal `+`, or hit a hazard. Landing on spikes (`u`/`v`) ends the run immediately. CLICK interacts with clickable tiles—primarily removing breakable blocks (`x`) at a specified [x,y] to open/alter fall paths—and does not consume platform timers where present. UNDO rolls back the last action for recovery from a bad move or click.
